sections.paragraph:
verb להישנות

be repeated; be studied, learnt

verb לשנות

to change, alter

verb שונה (>>שֻׁנָּה)

be changed, altered

verb להשתנות

become different, to change oneself

verb לשנות (>>שינה)

to change, alter

verb לשנות (>>לִשְׁנוֹת)

be different, differ

feminine noun

tooth, odonto; cog (of wheel) ; prong (in instruments) , fork, sawtooth, serration

feminine noun שניים (>>שיניים)

tooth, odonto; cog (of wheel) ; prong (in instruments) , fork, sawtooth, serration
